comments.author: github-actions
comments.body:
**Tripwires Review**: Breaking change detected - extract_header_from_body() now only scans from bottom, breaking parsing of existing PRs with headers at top.

This violates the migration strategy tripwire from docs/learned/architecture/pr-footer-validation.md:

> Add support for new format BEFORE deprecating old format. Never break parsing of existing PRs.

**Recommendation**: Implement phase-zero detection - scan from bottom first (new format), then fall back to scanning from top (old format) if no header found. This ensures both old and new PR bodies parse correctly during migration.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body: i think we can assume there is only one header
